race.comment: HOT COCOA (9) showed ability saluting over this track and trip when resuming before two runs where she just missed the frame here at this circuit. Winning rider Holt reunites and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Right in this contest. BELLA ACE (4) returned in good order with a solid second over this course and distance and maps perfectly for this from gate two. Has to be included. LOOK AT ROSA (12) got the job done here at the latest effort and will have derived a stack of confidence from that overdue win. Top-three contender on the latest outing. DESARAE DOLL (11) is an honest conveyance who is yet to miss the top-five in ten career starts. Can run a race while fresh.
